title: Agent Main Recommendation System & UI Overhaul

items.text: Agent Mastery panel completely rebuilt — now shows a 'Should I main this?' recommendation for every agent based on the player's own stats
Main Score (0–100) algorithm added — composite score weighing win rate delta, KDA delta and ACS delta against the player's overall averages
Four verdict tiers introduced: Main This (green), Good Secondary (blue), Situational (yellow), Consider Avoiding (red)
Per-map breakdown added to each agent — shows win rate, ACS and game count on every map the agent was played
Best Map / Weakest Map callout cards added — green highlight for strongest map, red for weakest
Agent role labels added (Duelist / Controller / Initiator / Sentinel) with colour-coded dots for quick visual identification
AgentMastery component made full-width on the player profile page for better readability
stats-processor.ts extended — AgentStat interface now includes mapBreakdown, bestMap, worstMap, mainScore, mainVerdict, mainReason fields
Agent role lookup table added (getAgentRole) covering all current Valorant agents including Tejo, Waylay, Clove and Vyse
SearchBar translated to English — placeholder, error message, button labels and recent searches header updated
MatchCard translated — Victory/Defeat labels, Shot Distribution, KAST ratio, Damage per round, First Blood, Score header
TiltMeter translated — Mental State, Last 5 Games, K/D Trend, Aggression labels updated
KdaTrendChart translated — trend badges (Rising / Falling / Stable) and Avg stat labels updated
Player profile page translated — Server label, Current Rank, Back button, Refresh button, demo mode notice, error retry button
Devlog validator updated to support 'infrastructure' category — v2.0.0 entry was silently skipped before this fix
